news.t: Tortoise Capital Launches the Actively Managed Tortoise Nuclear Renaissance ETF (TNUK), Offering Investors the Chance to Benefit from the Accelerating Nuclear Renaissance

holdings.infoBox: TNUK is an equity ETF with a total of 26 individual holdings. The top holdings are Curtiss-Wright stock at 8.54%, BWX Technologies at 8.02%, Doosan Enerbility at 7.64%, Cameco at 7.30%, and Mirion Technologies at 7.17%.

overview.description: The Tortoise Nuclear Renaissance ETF (TNUK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed, aiming to give investors pure-play equity exposure to the full global nuclear ecosystem. Companies are selected and weighted based on revenue ties to the industry TNUK was launched on Dec 18, 2025 and is issued by Tortoise.

data.title: Tortoise Capital Launches the Actively Managed Tortoise Nuclear Renaissance ETF (TNUK), Offering Investors the Chance to Benefit from the Accelerating Nuclear Renaissance
data.text: OVERLAND PARK, Kan.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Tortoise Capital launches TNUK ETF, actively managed fund focused on full scope of the global nuclear ecosystem.
